operations.summary: Start a task to calculate violations for an access request
operations.notes:
Create a calculation task to find access requests violations.
Returns a task Id that can be used to check the task status and get the task results

parameters.name: use_topology
parameters.description: Use topology to determine access request domains.

parameters.name: ar_domain_mode
parameters.description: The access request uses resources from multiple domains.

responseMessages.message: Access request violations task was accepted.
Access request order is not unique.
Domain cannot be specified when domain mode is false.
Cannot specify both ticket domain id and source and destination domains.
No domain specified in MSSP mode.
Domain does not exist.
Access request is malformed.
No valid access requests (Access requests cannot have topology enabled and the Internet object in the Source/Destination)
No network source were specified.
No network destination were specified.
Access is denied.
Access request violations task was rejected.
Custom applications must have their services configured.

operations.notes: Delete an access request violations task.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the access request violations task.

responseMessages.message: Access request violations task has been aborted successfully.
Access is denied.
Access request violations task was not found.

operations.notes: Get result of access requests violations task.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the access request violations task.

responseMessages.message: Access request violations task results were received.
Access is denied.
An error occurred during the calculation.
The calculation for the task has not finished yet.

operations.notes: Get access requests violations task status.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the access request violations task.

responseMessages.message: Access request violations task status was received.
Access is denied.
Access request violations task status was not found.

operations.summary: Get violations for an access request
operations.notes:
Calculate the violations for the given access request.
Note: this API may take a while to complete.
See the asynchronous API /violations/access_request/task as an alternative.

parameters.name: use_topology
parameters.description: Use topology to determine access request domains.

parameters.name: ar_domain_mode
parameters.description: The access request supports multiple domains.

responseMessages.message: Access request violations were calculated.
Access request order is not unique.
Domain cannot be specified when domain mode is false.
Cannot specify both ticket domain id and source and destination domains.
No domain specified in MSSP mode.
Domain does not exist.
Access request is malformed.
No valid access requests (Access requests cannot have topology enabled and the Internet object in the Source/Destination).
Access is denied.
Custom applications must have their services configured.
